jobs.label: validation_gate_build
jobs.prompt:
ROADMAP: roadmap.authority.cleanup.unified.operator.write.validation.gate

Build the shared operator write validation and normalization gate.

Read surfaces/api/operator_write.py, surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py, and any existing operator normalization code.

OBJECTIVE: Extract the shared operator write validation gate into a single canonical module:
- surfaces/api/_operator_validation_gate.py — shared validate_operator_write(params) function
  - Normalizes param names (camelCase → snake_case, aliases)
  - Validates required fields and types
  - Returns normalized params or raises ValueError with structured error
- Both surfaces/api/operator_write.py and surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py import and call it
- No duplicate validation logic across surfaces

Also build the canonical native operator binding projection:
- In surfaces/api/_operator_validation_gate.py, add derive_native_bindings(normalized_params) that returns the canonical {roadmap_key, title, priority, status} projection used by all operator writes

Submit code change summary via praxis_submit_code_change.

jobs.label: frontdoors_wire
jobs.prompt:
ROADMAP: roadmap.authority.cleanup.unified.operator.write.validation.gate.frontdoors

Wire CLI and MCP operator-write front doors to use the new validation gate.

Read surfaces/api/_operator_validation_gate.py (just built), surfaces/api/operator_write.py, surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py.

OBJECTIVE:
- Ensure surfaces/api/operator_write.py calls validate_operator_write() at the top of each handler before any DB writes
- Ensure surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py calls validate_operator_write() before any mutation
- Both surfaces must have identical validation semantics (same gate, same errors)
- Delete any duplicated inline normalization code that the gate now covers

Run the relevant tests to confirm nothing broke.

Submit code change summary via praxis_submit_code_change.

jobs.label: validation_proof
jobs.prompt:
ROADMAP: roadmap.authority.cleanup.unified.operator.write.validation.gate.proof

Validate and prove the unified operator write validation gate works.

Read surfaces/api/_operator_validation_gate.py, surfaces/api/operator_write.py, surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py.

OBJECTIVE:
- Write or find tests in tests/unit/ that cover the validation gate's normalization
- Verify both surfaces call the same gate (no duplicated inline validation)
- Run the tests and confirm they pass
- Confirm derive_native_bindings() produces consistent output across both surfaces

Submit code change summary via praxis_submit_code_change.
